title: emerald items by ArthurOrsi
body:
dependencies:
[Implosible craft now possible ](https://modrinth.com/mod/impossible-crafts-now-possible)

Add exclusive emerald items to your game with the "Emerald Dimension" mod. New content and an emerald dimension are on the way!

"Emerald Dimension" brings a new experience to Minecraft, focusing on emeralds as the main material.

Currently, the mod adds a fully functional emerald armor. In addition, there are items under development, such as tools, a special chest with 140 slots, and an emerald barrel with 76 slots. All items are craftable in the game.

In future updates, I plan to add a new dimension entirely made of emeralds, more items, and improved textures. I intend to release new content regularly.

If you encounter any bugs, feel free to let me know, and I will fix them as soon as possible.

Feel free to include this mod in your modpacks!

This mod is required on both the client and server sides to work correctly in multiplayer servers.

This mod has no specific requirements. Just install it and enjoy the new features it brings to your Minecraft experience!

• [My site](https://arthurorsi.vercel.app) •
